spec.description: UPS shed/recover controller: telemetry freshness, decisions, and raw UPS readings (JHC-501 / JHC-527).
Σ W sums each selected UPS's real watts where reported (ups-a), else estimated from VA x 0.75 (ups-b).
spec.title: Output power (W)

spec.description: Apparent power (VA). Only the UniFi (ups-b) reports it; the CyberPower exposes VA only via an unmapped OID.
spec.title: Output power (VA)

spec.expr: max by (ups) (nut_dog_ups_source_state{state="healthy", ups=~"$ups"}) * 3 + max by (ups) (nut_dog_ups_source_state{state="hold", ups=~"$ups"}) * 2 + max by (ups) (nut_dog_ups_source_state{state="shed", ups=~"$ups"})

spec.title: nut-dog
